title: alyssum campestre var. micranthum
intro: Alyssum campestre var. micranthum, also known as lesser creeping alyssum, is a flowering plant species in the genus Alyssum, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum campestre var. micranthum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
